2205980.name: 终点站：僵尸幸存者 - Support DLC
2205980.description:
This DLC is a support option for those seeking further support in developing Terminus: Zombie Survivors. This DLC does not change gameplay in any way. Instead, it gives you the additional feature of having your name included in the in-game credits as a supporter. Your support will be recorded in the game forever.

❕ Important. Please note the following before supporting:

  • We have no plans to participate in a sale on this DLC because this is only for support.
  • You can add your name or nickname on the credits page via Settings > Misc > Supporter Credits menu in the game.
  • We will review the name and potentially deny it if it’s inappropriate or harmful.

Thank you for helping us with the development of Terminus: Zombie Survivors.
2205980.supported_languages: 韩语, 英语, 俄语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 日语, 法语, 简体中文, 德语, 繁体中文
